body.title: Skeleton — MCP aggregator + flat-file registry (boots before the DB)
body.summary: Owns the MCP aggregator and the flat-file device registry, with NO Postgres dependency — skeleton must boot before the DB is up, so a Postgres dependency here would make cold-start impossible. Flat-file registry is the boot-time source of truth for what devices exist and their halt state; the MCP aggregator fans tool calls out to devices.

key_concepts.name: flat-file registry
key_concepts.what: boot-durable device registry; no DB dependency (skeleton boots before Postgres)

key_concepts.name: halt registry
key_concepts.what: halt/priority state held flat-file so it survives a cold start

key_concepts.name: MCP aggregator
key_concepts.what: fans MCP tool dispatch out to the registered devices
